the martin jrm mars flying boat was conceived as a long range patrol bomber scaled up from the company s own pbm mariner initially retaining the twin tailfins of its predecessor the prototype xpb2m was officially launched in nov 1941 but first flew in june 1942 nhhc lclot 98272 16

the jrm mars was well suited to this task possessing a cargo capacity of some 32000lb or the ability to carry over 130 personnel powered by four r3350 engines it had a range of more than 4900 miles production was slow however and the us navy purchased only 5 aircraft nhhc nh 70280 36

from mid1945 the mars fleet with each aircraft given its own name operated between san francisco and hawaii they played an important logistical role during the korean war though marshall mars was lost to a fire in 1950 the remaining four aircraft served until 1955 nhhc nh 70215 46

poised to be scrapped in 1959 they were instead purchased for use as firefighting tankers in british columbia canada fitted with twin water scoops and a tank holding 7200 gallons the four mars aircraft were put into service two were lost over the following years coulsongroupcom 56
